statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow slice as Anton.

Added a printable Fuse Triage section to [quick-sheet.html](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\quick-sheet.html:96), routing common electrical symptoms to the existing accessory-power, trailer-light, audio/display, and fuse glossary pages without changing fuse facts. Added a print/save-PDF button and scoped print CSS in [styles.css](C:\Users\diazv\Desktop\Ridgeline\styles.css:11344), plus shared print action support in `shared-ui.js`.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge `--dump-dom` hit the known missing-main-landmark issue, so I used Playwright/Chrome fallback.
- Verified desktop, iPhone-width mobile, search for `fuse quick sheet`, scroll-lock cleanup, and print-media behavior.
- Captured `audit-v258` screenshots in `debug-screenshots/`.

Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`. Source used for print approach: MDN printing guidance, accessed 2026-05-16: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Media_queries/Printing

Next clean slice: either tighten the printed quick-sheet density further after real-device review, or continue fuse source validation with exact owner-manual / cover-label references.
